name: pinning_ttl_v1
description: Training examples covering adapter pinning, TTL-based eviction protection, pin/unpin operational sequences, and TTL renewal patterns.

pin_protection.description: Adapter is pinned and memory pressure reaches 90% — pinned adapter survives while unpinned adapters are evicted.

ttl_expiration.description: Pin with TTL=2h, describing adapter state at various time points before, at, and after expiry.

pin_unpin_sequences.description: Operational patterns — pin before deployment, unpin after migration, pin rotation, batch job lifecycle.

ttl_renewal.description: Adapter pinned with TTL=1h, renewed at t=45m with TTL=2h — effective timeline and renewal best practices.
